extortion.description: Fabcon manufactures and erects precast concrete wall panels for every type of structure. Projects range from a 10,000 square-foot machine shop to a one-million square foot distribution center, and from a single-story bakery to a 16-story housing facility.We will upload corporate data soon. Employee personal documents (passports, DLs and so on), financials, projects, drawings and specification, NDAs, etc.
